prd.oneLiner: Connect availability, shift templates, assignments and swaps, vacancy alerts, and operations reporting.
prd.goal: Maintain 98% or more required-staff coverage for planned shifts.
prd.whyNow: Availability, time off, and swap requests live in chat and spreadsheets, making vacancy response and fair assignment difficult.
prd.problem: Availability, time off, and swap requests live in chat and spreadsheets, making vacancy response and fair assignment difficult.
prd.solution: Connect availability, shift templates, assignments and swaps, vacancy alerts, and operations reporting.
prd.alternatives: Email, chat, spreadsheets, and manual ledgers
prd.differentiator: Manage intake, processing, and operations data as one connected source of truth.

targets.name: Frontline employee submitting work availability
targets.needs: Quickly register needed work and know its status.
targets.pain: Availability, time off, and swap requests live in chat and spreadsheets, making vacancy response and fair assignment difficult.

targets.name: Field operations and scheduling coordinator
targets.needs: Manage priority and history and review operations metrics.
targets.pain: Availability, time off, and swap requests live in chat and spreadsheets, making vacancy response and fair assignment difficult.

scenarios.text: Frontline employee submitting work availability completes work availability and time-off request submission and checks progress.
Field operations and scheduling coordinator reviews shift coverage, vacancy, and working-hours reporting.

prd.northStar: Share of operations requests completed on time

kpis.name: On-time processing rate
kpis.target: Maintain 98% or more required-staff coverage for planned shifts.
kpis.method: Monthly aggregation of completion history against target dates

kpis.name: Operations visibility
kpis.method: Share of registered requests connected to operations reporting

inScope: Work availability and time-off request submission
Schedule, shift, coverage, and change-history lookup
Schedule assignment, swap request, vacancy alert, and approval handling
Shift coverage, vacancy, and working-hours reporting
nonGoals: Replacing adjacent systems such as accounting or payroll
assumptions: User and organization data are available through company SSO.
Operators manage policy and classification criteria.
risks: Weak initial classification can cause incorrect processing.
Stale source data can reduce operational trust.
openQuestions: What defines urgent processing and approval?
What are the post-completion verification and reopen rules?
constraints: State, owner, and priority changes require audit logs.
